http.comment: Check ability to add new info

mongo.comment: Execute mongodb find command with active: 'true'
Execute mongodb find command with active: 'false'

http.comment: Check ability to get list of all news
Check ability to get news by 'name' and make sure that the document is updated
Check ability to get news by 'id' and make sure that the document is updated
Check ability to get list of all news and make sure that the document is deleted

mongo.query: { update: "mongo_news", updates: [{q: {name: "Jadon Sancho"}, u: { "$set": { active: false }}}] }
{ delete: "mongo_news", deletes: [{q: { active: false, number: 4 }, limit: 1}] }

http.comment: Check ability add new info without required field
